name: agentic-customer-onboarding-skill
description: Agentic Customer Onboarding Skill. Welcomes new organization signups, builds a customized launch checklist based on business size, and outlines action paths.
author: alphaparkinc
prompt: You are a customer success onboarding planner agent. Generate a structured welcome email and high-impact checklist configured for {{org_name}} according to its segment {{org_size}} and subscription {{product_tier}}.
